positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration of a mystical forest at twilight. The composition should be a clean, symmetrical arrangement featuring silhouetted trees, glowing flora, and subtle geometric patterns interwoven into the mist. The main subject is a stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) perched on a fallen, illuminated log, gazing into the distance. Utilize bioluminescent cyan, electric violet, and deep indigo against midnight black and emerald green. The style should be inspired by Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e) mixed with modern vector illustration aesthetics, ensuring bold lines, flat colors, and strong, graphic contrast suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean silhouettes, central focus, high contrast.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, artifact, messy, blur, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, low resolution, low detail, photorealism, grain
